# Ripperdoc

> Human First. Intelligence Amplified. Ripperdoc designs digital augmentations — AI, intelligent systems and automation — that expand what a person, team or organization can do. Technology is the augmentation; the human stays the hero.

Ripperdoc is a brand and practice focused on empowerment, not replacement. The name comes from the Cyberpunk universe, where a "ripperdoc" enhanced people beyond their biological limits. Today that role is played by specialists in AI, automation and knowledge systems: tools that let one person do work that once required a whole team — without losing control or judgment.

The website is trilingual: Norwegian (default), English and Polish.

## Site

- [Norsk / Norwegian](https://ripperdoc.ai/no)
- [English](https://ripperdoc.ai/en)
- [Polski / Polish](https://ripperdoc.ai/pl)

## What Ripperdoc does

- Intelligence: AI agents and decision support that help people analyze more information faster, without giving up control.
- Software: connected systems and automations that remember, coordinate and execute — turning intent into action.
- Infrastructure: tools and environments that bring AI into real work, reliably, privately and at scale.

## Project: RipperSync (concept in progress)

RipperSync is a concept being developed: it combines VR sessions from Meta Quest 3 with health data into one clear picture, analyzed by a private AI trainer. Because health data is sensitive, it runs self-hosted on the user's own NAS or VPS, under their control. Example integrations: Oura and Withings via Health Connect. A voice agent (ElevenLabs) is planned for later versions. Stack: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MCP, Meta Quest 3. There is an interactive 3D "bio-scan" demo on the site.

## Principles

- Empowerment, not replacement. The person stays at the centre.
- Concrete, earned results — not vanity metrics.
- Privacy and self-hosting for sensitive data.

## Contact

- Website: https://ripperdoc.ai
- To work together: book a diagnostic session via the site.
